headlines.description: — Zach LaVine had 31 points, DeMar DeRozan scored 29, and the Sacramento Kings turned back a late rally to hold on for a 135-133 victory over the Milwaukee Bucks on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: LaVine, DeRozan lead Kings past Bucks 135-133

headlines.description: — Quenton Jackson scored 12 of his 25 points in the fourth quarter as the Indiana Pacers snapped a season-opening five-game losing streak with a 114-109 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pacers snap season-opening 5-game losing streak with a 114-109 win over the Warriors

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 26 points in three quarters before resting the fourth, Amen Thompson added 17 points and nine rebounds, and the Houston Rockets beat the Boston Celtics 128-101 on Saturday night.

headlines.description: — Jalen Duren had a career high 33 points and also pulled down 10 rebounds, Cade Cunningham added 21 points with 18 assists and the Detroit Pistons pulled away in the fourth quarter to beat the Dallas Mavericks 122-110 in Mexico City on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Duren's 33 points lead Pistons to victory over Mavericks in Mexico City
